g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T181551
g.text: Some things are also themselves of such a sort as
whatever may be present (in/to them); others are

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T182513
g.text: If someone dyes anything a certain colour, that
which is smeared on is present to the thing that

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T184302
g.text: ( If someone dyes anything a certain colour, that
which is smeared on being thus present to the
thing that has been dyed, the colour of the thing
that has been dyed is not the same as that of what

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T185739
g.text: ( If someone dyed your (i.e., Menexenus's) hair,
which is blond, with lead white, not[ they would

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T191259
g.text: ( If someone dyed your (i.e., Menexenus's) hair,
which is blond, with lead white, they would appear

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T193646
g.text: If someone dyed your (i.e., Menexenus's) hair,
which is blond, with lead white, whiteness would

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T194743
g.text: If someone dyed your (i.e., Menexenus's) hair,
which is blond, with lead white, not[ the hair
would be in any way whiter than it was before ]

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T195224
g.text: If someone dyed your (i.e., Menexenus's) hair,
which is blond, with lead white, (though)
whiteness being present, not[ the hair would be
white ], not[ the hair would be black ]

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T200422
g.text: When old age has brought (to hair) the (white)
colour, (the hair) becomes like that which is
present, i.e., white by presence of white

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T203834
g.text: ( When something is present, not[ that which
possesses (what is present to it) is such as what

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T204708
g.text: ( When something is present, if this is present
not in a certain way, not[ that which possesses
(what is present to it) is such as what is present

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T204411
g.text: ( When something is present, if this is present in
a certain way, that which possesses (what is
present to it) is such as what is present )

g.title: tlg0059_tlg020.T210154
g.text: There are times in which, when bad is present,
what is neither bad nor good is not yet bad, and
others in which this has already become bad
